ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of the chart (e.g., bar, line, pie) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chart is public or private */,
  "is_template" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chart is a template */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template chart if it's a derived chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update made to the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart this property belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., backdropColor) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., Color, Padding, function) */,
  "scriptable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property can be modified via script */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is required */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the property (if applicable) */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the property (if applicable) */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of allowed values (if applicable) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_properties_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, guest) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart being tracked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total view count for the chart */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the chart was viewed */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the chart has been shared */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the chart has been downloaded */,
  "average_time_spent" INTEGER /* Average time spent viewing the chart (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_analytics_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_versions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "callbacks" (
  "callback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each callback */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart this callback is associated with */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function to be executed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the callback function */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the callback is active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("callback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_callbacks_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the color scheme */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of color values */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the color scheme is the default scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "padding_options" (
  "padding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each padding entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chart this padding belongs to */,
  "padding_value" INTEGER /* Value of the padding */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the padding option is the default option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("padding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_padding_options_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_system_setting" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is a system-wide setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
